overall.description: Static game engine footage of a medieval stone bedroom interior illuminated by warm candlelight. The scene features wooden furniture, an arched doorway with a metal gate, and textured stone walls. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip with no movement or action occurring.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval stone bedroom illuminated by candlelight. The room features a central bed with gold bedding, wooden furniture including a table and dresser, and rough stone walls. Candle sconces on the left and right walls provide warm lighting, while a green tapestry hangs on the back wall above an arched doorway with a metal gate. The scene remains completely still with no movement or changes throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, unchanging view of a medieval stone bedroom bathed in the warm, flickering glow of candlelight. It begins with a focused perspective on a central bed adorned with gold bedding, surrounded by rustic wooden furniture and rough-hewn stone walls. As the eye wanders across the space, the lighting from candle sconces on the left and right walls emphasizes the textures of the room. The scene then settles on the back wall, where a green tapestry hangs above an arched doorway secured by a metal gate. The environment remains completely still and silent, preserving a singular, frozen moment of atmospheric tranquility.
